_comment: Zenodo GitHub integration metadata (https://developers.zenodo.org/#github). Intended for the public repos: fast-weight-memory-lm (primary) and aware-latent-depth. Enable the Zenodo webhook on the repo (zenodo.org > GitHub > flip the switch), then cut a GitHub release/tag; Zenodo mints a DOI from this metadata automatically. Update 'related_identifiers' with the arXiv DOI once assigned.
title: fast-weight-memory-lm: Fast-Weight Memory Layers Improve Small Language Models at Matched Parameters and Compute
description: Code, pre-registrations, run-level ledger, and figures for a matched-parameter, matched-compute study of gated delta-rule fast-weight memory layers versus a Transformer++ baseline, chain-of-thought economics, and weight-tied recurrent depth, on the SAGE procedural benchmark.
